articles.title: Stock market has its worst day since the war with Iran started and crude oil prices rise
articles.description:
The Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped 469 points, or 1%, and the Nasdaq composite sank 2.4% to fall more than 10% below its all-time high set early this year.

The post Stock market has its worst day since the war with Iran started and crude oil prices rise appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Dow Jones dropped 469 points, marking its worst day since the Iran conflict began.
Nasdaq fell 2.4%, now over 10% below its early 2023 all-time high.
Rising crude oil prices may lead to increased fuel costs for Boston residents.

articles.title: Cambridge pediatric doctor running fifth Boston Marathon to support Mass General patients
articles.description:
"This is going to be my fifth year as part of this incredible team, and I am eternally grateful to run in honor of the patients we serve. "

The post Cambridge pediatric doctor running fifth Boston Marathon to support Mass General patients appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cambridge pediatric doctor Jennifer Leah Goetz runs fifth Boston Marathon on April 17, 2023.
Goetz aims to raise funds for patients at Mass General Hospital.
Local residents benefit from increased support for pediatric healthcare services.

articles.title: Dash Crofts of Seals & Crofts, known for hits ‘Summer Breeze’ and ‘Diamond Girl,’ dies at 87
articles.description:
Crofts died Wednesday of heart failure at the Heart Hospital of Austin in Austin, Texas, said his daughter, Lua Crofts Faragher.

The post Dash Crofts of Seals & Crofts, known for hits ‘Summer Breeze’ and ‘Diamond Girl,’ dies at 87 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Dash Crofts, of Seals & Crofts, died at 87 from heart failure on March 26.
Crofts was known for iconic songs like 'Summer Breeze' and 'Diamond Girl.'
His music continues to influence Boston's local music scene and cultural events.

articles.title: Brothers unite for Boston Marathon run honoring family, cancer losses
articles.description:
"I've realized every day is a gift, and the ability to run is something that gets taken for granted."

The post Brothers unite for Boston Marathon run honoring family, cancer losses appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brothers Collin and Nally will run the Boston Marathon to honor family cancer losses.
They aim to raise awareness for Dana-Farber Cancer Institute during the April 17 race.
Their participation highlights the ongoing fight against cancer in the Boston community.

Recognition boosts local tourism and community pride in Boston's sports culture.

articles.title: State Police Sgt. Scott Quigley indicted in deadly Woburn crash
articles.description:
The deadly collision saw renewed attention earlier this year after concerns about Quigley’s past delayed the retrial of an unrelated murder case he investigated.

The post State Police Sgt. Scott Quigley indicted in deadly Woburn crash appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: State Police Sgt. Scott Quigley indicted for a deadly crash in Woburn.
The incident has raised concerns about Quigley's past investigations.
This case may affect public trust in local law enforcement.

articles.title: Framingham’s iconic ‘castle’ hotel has entered a new era. Take a look inside.
articles.description:
The building originally opened in the 1970s as the Sheraton Tara Hotel.

The post Framingham’s iconic ‘castle’ hotel has entered a new era. Take a look inside. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Framingham's Sheraton Tara Hotel, opened in the 1970s, has undergone significant renovations.
The hotel is now rebranded and aims to attract more local visitors and events.
New amenities and services are expected to boost local tourism and economy.
